day=1; meal=breaded fish bites, roasted potatoes, tartar sauce; setting=Watching TV with TV on Right; time_of_day=morning;
preferences: microwave_time=1 min; occlusion_relevance=minimize right occlusion; robot_speed=medium; skewering_axis=parallel to major axis; web_interface_confirmation=no; transfer_mode=outside mouth transfer; outside_mouth_distance=near; convey_robot_ready_for_initiating_transfer=speech; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_feeding=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfer_wiping=button; convey_robot_ready_for_completing_transfer=speech; detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding=perception; detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking=button; detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping=button; retract_between_bites=yes; bite_dipping_preference=do not dip; wait_before_autocontinue_seconds=10 sec

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes watching TV on the user's right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN minimize right occlusion BECAUSE the user explicitly chose to preserve visibility toward the right-side TV.

skewering_axis.user_tendencies: IF food requires fork acquisition during feeding AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE the user has limited mouth opening, and narrower bites are more compatible with that physical constraint.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF dining context is a neutral personal meal AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is foods without sauces or dips, THEN outside mouth transfer BECAUSE the user can lean forward comfortably and explicitly selected the less intrusive transfer style in the observed meal. No context-dependent variation observed yet beyond this.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF transfer_mode is outside mouth transfer AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN near BECAUSE the user selected a close stop distance, which likely reduces required reach while remaining outside the mouth. No context-dependent variation observed yet.

detect_user_ready_for_initiating_transfe.user_tendencies: IF dining context involves possible distraction or conversation AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN button BECAUSE the user has reliable arm control and limited mouth opening makes open-mouth readiness less attractive.

IF dining context involves possible distraction or conversation AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN button BECAUSE the user can reliably press buttons and explicitly preferred direct control in the observed meal.

detect_user_completed_transfer_feeding.user_tendencies: IF task is feeding AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN perception BECAUSE the user explicitly chose the reliable low-effort completion detection method.

detect_user_completed_transfer_drinking.user_tendencies: IF task is drinking AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN button BECAUSE the user explicitly preferred explicit manual completion signaling over automatic continuation.

detect_user_completed_transfer_wiping.user_tendencies: IF task is mouth wiping AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN button BECAUSE the user explicitly preferred explicit manual completion signaling over automatic continuation.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF dining context includes watching TV on the user's right AND affective_state is neutral AND food_condition is any food condition, THEN yes BECAUSE the user chose to reduce prolonged visual obstruction in a context where right-side visibility matters.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF food includes a dip or sauce AND affective_state is neutral AND dining context is the observed TV-watching meal, THEN do not dip BECAUSE the user explicitly declined dipping despite tartar sauce being available, suggesting a conservative preference against added sauce application.
